message:
feat: add XDG Base Directory spec support with backward compatibility

Config and data paths now follow XDG conventions on fresh installs:
- Config: $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/mcp-agent-mail/ (~/.config/mcp-agent-mail/)
- Data: $XDG_DATA_HOME/mcp-agent-mail/ (~/.local/share/mcp-agent-mail/)

Backward compatible: if legacy paths (~/.mcp_agent_mail_git_mailbox_repo,
~/.mcp_agent_mail/) exist on disk, they are used instead. CLI overrides
(STORAGE_ROOT, AM_EXPORT_DIR, etc.) continue to take precedence.

No new dependencies — uses existing dirs v6 crate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
